1731210.name: Eclypse Lobby
1731210.description:
Eclypse Lobby is a free software for customization in order to have a realistic experience.

- Lobby function -
Eclypse Lobby is a launcher allowing you to have access to the different platforms used by Eclypse, connect to a server, join our discord, our teamspeak etc.. All this, from our lobby. You can also read the rules, watch our trailers and direct-connect to our teamspeak

- Sound modification - (SOON)
Eclypse Lobby will allow you to modify some of the sounds present in the game in order to increase the realism of your game.

- Optional Features - (SOON)
We will also allow you some practical functions like being able to empty its cache in only one click, and many other things.
